name: Chicken Breasts with Apricots
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small bowl, soak the apricots in apple juice until they are tender, about 30 minutes.
2. Drain the apricots and reserve half a cup of the apple juice.
3. Season the chicken breasts with salt and paprika.
4. Heat vegetable oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
5. Add shallots to the skillet and sauté for 2 minutes.
6. Add the seasoned chicken breasts to the skillet and cook until lightly browned, about 2-3 minutes per side.
7. Add the reserved apple juice, white wine, and nutmeg to the skillet.
8. Reduce heat to low and cover the skillet; simmer for 10 minutes.
9. Stir in the apricots and continue to simmer covered for an additional 5 minutes.
10. Sprinkle toasted walnuts over the top before serving.
Makes 4 servings, with approximately 355 calories each.
